_note: Stage C/D/E/I — GeminiNanoBanana2V2 image generation recipe.
node '1' LoadImage              inputs.image <- uploaded reference image 1 filename
node '2' LoadImage              inputs.image <- uploaded reference image 2 filename
node '3' GeminiNanoBanana2V2    inputs.prompt <- generation prompt text
Reference images are optional — nodes 1 and 2 are only used when ref_paths are supplied.
If no refs are supplied, the connections model.images.image_1/2 are still present but
LoadImage will use the placeholder PNG (which is a harmless 1x1 pixel).
Gemini API key must be configured in comfy-api-liberation settings.

inputs.prompt: Placeholder — controller patches this with the generation prompt.
inputs.system_prompt: You are an expert architectural visualization image generator. Follow the prompt precisely, maintaining photorealism and brand consistency.
